nodes.label: Save and restore tools/cli/run_agent modules around every test.
When provider resolves to openai-codex and no model was explicitly     chosen,
Model comes from config.yaml, not LLM_MODEL env var.     Config.yaml is the sin
When the user sets model.default in config.yaml to a specific codex     model,
If the user explicitly passes a Codex-compatible model, it must be     preserve
openai/gpt-5.3-codex should become gpt-5.3-codex — the Codex     Responses API
When a display name is passed, it should appear in the saved entry.
